display.purpose: Toolbar brand, page titles, modal titles.

body.purpose: Default dashboard and form copy at 13px.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, chip labels at 12px.

motion.name: ease-medium
motion.purpose: Rail sheet slide, grid column changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main commit actions: sign in, save, add link.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid var(--bookmark-active-bg, #1c2433); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--bookmark-active-bg, #1c2433); color: var(--bookmark-active-fg, #fff); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--bookmark-text, #1c2433); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--bookmark-accent, #3d5eff); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions: GitHub auth, cancel, filters.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid var(--bookmark-control-border, #dce2ee); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--bookmark-control-bg, #f1f4fa); color: var(--bookmark-text, #1c2433); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--bookmark-border-strong, #d0d7e2); background: var(--bookmark-surface-muted, #f8f9fc); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--bookmark-accent, #3d5eff); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 44px; padding: 0 14px; border: 1px solid var(--bookmark-control-border, #dce2ee); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--bookmark-surface, #fff); color: var(--bookmark-text, #1c2433); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--bookmark-muted, #5c6679); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--bookmark-accent, #3d5eff); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--bookmark-accent, #3d5eff); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Tag rail filter chip; neutral default, color on hover/active.
components.css: .ds-tag-chip { border: 0; border-radius: 999px; margin: 0; padding: 6px 12px; background: transparent; color: var(--bookmark-text, #1c2433); font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-tag-chip:hover { background: var(--bookmark-control-bg, #f1f4fa); } .ds-tag-chip.is-active { background: var(--bookmark-active-bg, #1c2433); color: var(--bookmark-active-fg, #fff); } .ds-tag-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--bookmark-accent, #3d5eff); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Link List Row
components.description: Primary bookmark list item in the feed column.
components.css: .ds-list-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; min-height: 88px; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--bookmark-border, #e4e8f0); border-radius: 14px; background: var(--bookmark-surface, #fff); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-list-row:hover { border-color: var(--bookmark-border-strong, #d0d7e2); } .ds-list-row.is-selected { border-color: var(--bookmark-accent, #3d5eff); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(61, 94, 255, 0.2); } .ds-list-row-media { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--bookmark-border, #e4e8f0); background: var(--bookmark-surface-muted, #f8f9fc); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-list-row-body h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--bookmark-text, #1c2433); } .ds-list-row-body p { margin: 4px 0 0; font-size: 12px; color: var(--bookmark-muted, #5c6679); }

components.name: App Modal
components.description: Native dialog shell for edit flows.
components.html:
Edit link

Form content
components.css: .ds-modal { width: min(520px, calc(100vw - 32px)); padding: 0; border: 1px solid var(--bookmark-border, #e4e8f0); border-radius: 14px; background: var(--bookmark-surface, #fff); color: var(--bookmark-text, #1c2433); overflow: hidden; } .ds-modal::backdrop { background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.35); } .ds-modal-header { padding: 16px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bookmark-border, #e4e8f0); background: var(--bookmark-surface-muted, #f8f9fc); } .ds-modal-header h2 { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-modal-body { padding: 16px 18px; font-size: 13px; }

narrative.overview: Superlinks looks like a single-purpose workbench: cool neutral surfaces, tight typography, and accent color only where it marks selection or primary action. The bookmark dashboard is the canonical surface—auth, modals, tag selectors, and project views inherit its tokens from :root.
keyCharacteristics: Flat, border-defined panels on a soft canvas
Inter for header chrome; Plus Jakarta Sans for UI body
Pill buttons and inputs at 44px touch height on mobile
Native dialog modals with muted header/footer bars
Dark theme via data-theme token swap

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Accent blue appears on focus, selection, primary links, and bulk-target dashed chips—not as ambient page tint.

rules.name: The Flat Surface Rule
rules.body: Do not pair 1px borders with wide soft drop shadows on cards or buttons.

rules.name: The Fixed UI Scale Rule
rules.body: Dashboard UI uses fixed px steps (13/12/14/11), not fluid clamp headings.

rules.name: The No Ghost Card Rule
rules.body: List rows and auth cards do not use box-shadow plus border as paired decoration.

dos: Do use --bookmark-* tokens for any new surface.
Do keep touch targets at 44px on mobile for rails, toolbar CTAs, and row actions.
Do use visible form labels and :focus-visible rings on every custom control.
donts: Don't use rainbow stripe card headers or offset brutalist button shadows on new work.
Don't pair 1px borders with wide soft shadows (ghost-card pattern).
Don't use decorative grid overlays or cream magazine backgrounds on product surfaces.
Don't split component vocabulary between dashboard and auth.
